settings.heading:
Bihar's Finest
Fox Nuts
settings.description: Hand-harvested makhana from Bihar's pristine ponds. Roasted to perfection with pure desi ghee. No preservatives, no compromise.

settings.title: High in Protein
settings.description: 9.7g of protein per 100g — more than most nuts. Perfect for post-workout snacking.

settings.title: Low Glycaemic Index
settings.description: Safe for diabetics and weight-watchers. Makhana won't spike your blood sugar.

settings.title: Zero Preservatives
settings.description: No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives. Just pure, natural makhana.

settings.title: Only 347 Calories
settings.description: A large bowl has fewer calories than a small bag of chips. Guilt-free snacking.

settings.title: Gluten-Free
settings.description: Naturally gluten-free and suitable for celiac diets. Safe for the whole family.

settings.title: Ayurvedic Superfood
settings.description: Mentioned in ancient Ayurvedic texts as a sattvic food that promotes calm and longevity.

settings.section_desc: Makhana is one of nature's most complete superfoods — and we source only the finest Grade A from Bihar's pristine ponds.

settings.heading: Crafted for the Health-Conscious
settings.description: Six flavours, one standard — Bihar's finest. Each batch is hand-selected, lab-tested, and packed fresh.

settings.label: From Our Kitchen
settings.heading: Recipes, Tips & Stories
settings.description: Makhana recipes, health tips and farm stories — published fresh, every week.
